TestCase z14Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_v = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_v, t1.v, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.v = follow_case_v;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: set random subarray elements to 0.0 when they are > 0.0
    int start = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int end = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (start > end) {
        int tmp = start;
        start = end;
        end = tmp;
    }
    for (int i = start; i <= end; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.v[i] > 0.0) {
            follow_case.v[i] = 0.0;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
